ModMetaData.name: Biomes! Bees
ModMetaData.author: The Biomes Mod Team
ModMetaData.description:
A simple and cozy mod that adds beekeeping to the Rim. It adds bees and associated items, including wax for candles and delicious mead. Queen Bees can be found from wild hives
Safe to add, not safe to remove. Requires Harmony.
